zh.Combe St Nicholas, Somerset, England, Un: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特可姆 聖 尼古拉斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Sydenham於1337年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特可姆 聖 尼古拉斯時，他的父親Roger De Sydenham38歲，母親Agnes Boye35歲。他於1362年與Joan Dallingridge在英國英格蘭肯特希登哈姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1402年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特布普頓享年65歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Sydenham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Sydenham in Bridgwater (Somerset), Sydenham Damerel (Devon), and Sydenham (Oxon).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. en.lifeSummary: When Richard Sydenham was born in 1337, in Combe St Nicholas, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger De Sydenham, was 38 and his mother, Agnes Boye, was 35. He married Joan Dallingridge in 1362, in Sydenham, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1402, in Brympton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65, and was buried in Church, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Combe St Nicholas, Somerset, England, Un: Combe St Nicholas, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Sydenham est né en 1337, à Combe St Nicholas, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger De Sydenham, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Agnes Boye, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Joan Dallingridge en 1362, à Sydenham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1402, à Brympton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Church, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Combe St Nicholas, Somerset, England, Un: Combe St Nicholas, Somerset, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Sydenham 1337 in Combe St Nicholas, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger De Sydenham 38 und seine Mutter Agnes Boye 35. Er hat 1362 in Sydenham, Kent, England, United Kingdom Joan Dallingridge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1402 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Brympton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Church, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ko.Combe St Nicholas, Somerset, England, Un: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 코브 스트 닉홀아스
ko.lifeSummary: Richard Sydenham(이)가 1337년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 코브 스트 닉홀아스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger De Sydenham(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Boye(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1362년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 시데함에서 Joan Dallingridge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1402년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 브리프턴에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Sydenham nasceu em 1337, em Combe St Nicholas, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger De Sydenham, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Boye, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Dallingridge em 1362, em Sydenham, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. ru.Combe St Nicholas, Somerset, England, Un: комб ст ничолас, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Sydenham родился в 1337 г. в местности комб ст ничолас, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger De Sydenham было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Boye, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Dallingridge в 1362 г. в местности сиденам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1402 г. в местности бримптон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности чурч, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
